occupation: COO / Board Member at Screen Network
headline: COO & Board Member at Screen Network | Driving Innovation in Digital OOH Advertising🌐
summary:
As COO and a Board Member at Screen Network, I lead operations, strategy, and innovation at one of Poland's leading Digital OOH companies. With over 20 years of experience in the sector, I have spearheaded numerous high-impact advertising campaigns that have earned recognition and awards both domestically and internationally. 🇵🇱🌐

In addition to my role at Screen Network, I serve as the Head of the DOOH Working Group at IAB Polska, where we focus on developing industry standards, promoting best practices, and driving educational initiatives to advance the DOOH sector in Poland and beyond.

I am deeply passionate about sharing my expertise—whether through industry publications or as a speaker at major events—to inspire growth, innovation, and collaboration in the DOOH landscape.
